Transcrição Completa: 5 How Can You Guarantee That I'll Make Money
[00:00] How can you guarantee that I'll make money on this investment?
[00:04] So, I'm going to give you a few different answers here based on what niche you might be in.
[00:09] Let's start with the information product niche. How can you guarantee I'll make money on this information product?
[00:16] Very fair question. It's really up to you. This is an information product.
[00:21] At the end of the day, if this is just going to be another course that you buy, another program that you purchase, another mentoring offer, and you don't do anything that we say, yeah, you're definitely not going to make money with it.
[00:33] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Information Product Accountability"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Representação de cursos e programas sendo ignorados vs implementados, comparação visual entre ação e inação, ícones de responsabilidade pessoal
[00:35] If you are the wrong type of person, I would not encourage that you buy this offer.
[00:40] Because at the end of the day, what really guarantees if you're going to make money with what we teach is you taking the information that we teach you and using it in your day-to-day.
[00:49] If that is not you, do not buy this program. You will not get results if you are not an action taker.
[00:56] We do a lot to make it as simple as we possibly can to load you up with as many resources as we can to be there for you when you have questions in real time so you have the best possibility of getting a result with what we teach.
[01:09] But at the end of the day, it comes down to you.
[01:12] How can you guarantee me that you'll actually take action on what we're going to teach you so you can get results with it?
[01:18] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Investor Niche Differentiation"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Divisão entre pessoas levantando capital vs negócios de automação, diferentes perspectivas de oferta, segmentação de nicho
[01:20] Okay. Now, for the investor niche, which could really be once again people raising money or potentially these automation businesses, u there's different there's different uh perspectives that come along with these two different offers.
[01:33] Typically, automation businesses do offer a money back guarantee on the offer and you can be transparent about why it's so easy to be able to offer money back guarantees.
[01:43] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Automation Business Examples"
NÚMEROS: 12-month money back guarantee, $40,000 investment example
VISUAL: Ícones de Amazon, Walmart, Facebook Shop, Shopify, representação de lojas de e-commerce, timeline de 12 meses
[01:45] So, as an example, if I'm selling an Amazon automation business or or even like a Facebook shop, uh or a Shopify e-commerce store, pretty much anything other than a drop shipping asset, um that asset becomes worth more even if no sales are made.
[02:00] If you just have an Amazon account or a Walmart account that's been there for like a year, it's worth more at the end of the year, even if no sales have been made through it, because we can turn around and resell that asset as an aged store, which has a higher probability of making more money with the right products on it, being optimized properly, and it has a lower probability of being disabled because of its length of time on those platforms.
[02:23] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Aged Store Value Proposition"
NÚMEROS: 12 months aging period, same investment amount buyback
VISUAL: Timeline mostrando valorização de conta ao longo do tempo, gráfico de valor crescente, ícones de plataformas confiando mais em contas antigas
[02:25] So, if we're transparent with people about the fact that listen, you're going to invest money with us today.
[02:31] We're going to do everything in our power to make sure that everything that we know to get products sold through the storefront we're going to create for you. We're going to make sure that happens.
[02:41] And to be clear, in the instance that we literally make no money together over the next 12 months, we offer that 12-month money back guarantee.
[02:49] And let me tell you why it's so easy to offer that to you.
[02:52] With the money that you put up today, you're going to create a brand new store. And over the course of the next 12 months, that store becomes more valuable because it's officially an aged account after the course of a year.
[03:04] So if you don't want that store, we as an organization will happily buy it back from you. We'll buy it back from you for the same amount you're about to sell it to us at now.
[03:14] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Buyback Guarantee Mechanism"
NÚMEROS: $40,000 investment example, same amount buyback after 1 year
VISUAL: Fluxo de dinheiro circular, investimento inicial retornando integralmente, mecanismo de recompra destacado
[03:16] So to be clear, if you put up 40,000 today and you want 40,000 a year from now and you want to get out of your store, we'll happily do that.
[03:25] Why? because we can then turn around and take that and sell it as an aged store to somebody who wants an aged account.
[03:32] Like I said, there's a lower probability that those types of stores get disabled. There's a higher probability they can make more money, rank higher in the search engines, and overall be trusted more by those platforms because they've existed longer.
[03:44] So, we're happy to offer the money back guarantee to be clear.
[03:48] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Investment Reality Check"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Comparação com mercado de ações e imóveis, gráficos de volatilidade, ícones de regulamentação, realidade de investimentos
[03:50] And we do so with an incentive. If I'm an investor, I want to compare it to every other way they can invest money.
[03:57] Every investor watching this is you you and I both know there's no guaranteed amount of money that can be made through an investment.
[04:04] You know, it's all relative to the markets. And sure, there's some things that we can do in influence in order to get a higher probability to make money, but we have to disclose with people just by comparables how it really works.
[04:16] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Accredited Investor Response Script"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Script de resposta profissional, ícones de regulamentação, representação de investidor acreditado, transparência regulatória
[04:18] So, as an example, hey investor, how can you actually guarantee that I'm going to make money on this investment?
[04:25] Well, client, very fair question. Uh, you I can't. You know, simply put, we're going to do everything in our power to make sure that the probabilities are at their highest, that you're going to be able to get a return on what you invest with us today.
[04:38] But you know how it is as an accredited investor. We can't do that. We can't do that from a regulation perspective.
[04:45] And you know, we simply can't control what the markets are going to do.
[04:49] What we can do is our absolute best to manipulate and control what is within our control to increase the odds of you making back that investment.
[04:57] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Market Reality Examples"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Exemplos de negócios imobiliários bons e ruins, gráficos de ações subindo e descendo, realidade de mercado balanceada
[04:59] But I'm sure you've put money into a real estate deal that's gone bad. I'm sure you've put money into stocks that have gone down at some point in your lifetime, but I'm sure you've also done some killer real estate deals.
[05:11] I'm sure you've also done some killer stock returns. And at the end of the day, you understand how it goes.
[05:17] The market conditions have to be right for us to be able to get a great return for you.
[05:22] But as I mentioned with what we do, let me walk you through once again how we stack the odds in your favor that you're going to have a high probability of getting a return when you put money up with us.
[05:33] Let me walk through it with you.
